message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand mission (#930)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-273-support-atlantis-state-rm-subcommand",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand",
+    "description": "Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand. Requested by 98+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current atlantis deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your atlantis version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working atlantis installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\nIn some cases (such as someone deleted a resource outside of the context of terraform) you need to be able to run a `terraform state rm $RESOURCE` command to resolve it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand",
+        "description": "## what\n\n- comment_parser can parse subcommand\n  - command handles command args, so add arg count limitation by command\n- add `atlantis state rm ADDRESS...` command\n- add `state_rm` stage which do `init` and `state_rm` steps\n  - `state_rm` step do `terraform state rm` and discard a planfile.\n- not implemented in this PR\n  - `state_requirements` like `apply_requirements`\n\n## why\n\n`terraform state rm` is required manually. If Atlantis provides this feature, we do it on GitHub PR and so on.\n\n##\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\n- comment_parser can parse subcommand\n  - command handles command args, so add arg count limitation by command\n- add `atlantis state rm ADDRESS...` command\n- add `state_rm` stage which do `init` and `state_rm` steps\n  - `state_rm` step do `terraform state rm` and discard a planfile.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/273",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/2880"
+    },
+    "reactions": 98,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:29:34.728Z",
